posts.author: Ramarm (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!
Lately I started writing my first app.
For one of my functions I have to get all the items with by a date column. I saw in the api documents how to do that, but it supports only one value at a time.
Is there a way to get all the items between 2 date values in one query? I can run a different query for each date qnd merge in my code but its really not the thing I wanna do

Thank you very much!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ramarm!

Great question. At this time I’m afraid that our items_by_column_values() queries only support searching for a single value at a time, not a range between values.

As such, I’ve moved this post into our “Feature Requests” section, as well as forwarded this for our dev team’s consideration.

I will update here once this feature has been released. Thank you!
